chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. D–2454 of 2023 [Ali Muhammad Vs. Federation of Pakistan & another] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing of case For hearing of main case. 23.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Hanif Samma, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Amin Ahmed, Assistant Director Passports (Legal). Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Muhammad Hanif Samma, learned counsel for the petitioner, has received the copy of the parawise comments filed on behalf of respondent No.1 wherein they have clearly stated that there is no bar on petitioner’s travelling abroad or to obtain new passport. Mr. Samma, however, submits that at this point in time he is holding a valid passport which is renewable in 2029. This fact is not opposed by Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, learned D.A.G. We do not have such record to reconcile the expiry of the passport. With this understanding of facts and law when the name of the petitioner is no more available in the PCL, the petition is disposed of. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
